data.name: AreaLabel
data.value: Consumer area

data.name: NextStepsTitle
data.value: What will be available here

data.name: MyProfileTitle
data.value: My profile

data.name: MyProfileSummary
data.value: You will be able to review the profile information linked to your signed-in account.

data.name: MyProfileStatus
data.value: Profile details are not loaded in this setup screen.

data.name: MyProfileNextIdentity
data.value: Show the party profile connected to your identity.

data.name: MyProfileNextData
data.value: Keep personal data access scoped to your own party record.

data.name: EditProfileTitle
data.value: Edit profile

data.name: EditProfileSummary
data.value: You will be able to request corrections to profile details that can be changed through self-service.

data.name: EditProfileStatus
data.value: Profile updates are not submitted in this setup screen.

data.name: EditProfileNextReview
data.value: Review editable fields before submitting a correction.

data.name: EditProfileNextSubmit
data.value: Send changes through the protected host workflow.

data.name: ConsentTitle
data.value: Consent

data.name: ConsentSummary
data.value: You will be able to see choices that depend on consent and change them where consent is the legal basis.

data.name: ConsentStatus
data.value: Consent choices are not changed in this setup screen.

data.name: ConsentNextChoices
data.value: Separate consent choices from contract or legitimate-interest processing.

data.name: ConsentNextRecords
data.value: Record changes without using pre-selected choices.

data.name: PrivacyTitle
data.value: Data privacy

data.name: PrivacySummary
data.value: You will be able to request a copy of your data and start privacy requests from this protected area.

data.name: PrivacyStatus
data.value: Privacy requests are not started in this setup screen.

data.name: PrivacyNextExport
data.value: Prepare a data export request with clear progress messaging.

data.name: PrivacyNextErasure
data.value: Explain erasure effects before a destructive request is submitted.
